creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nathan Whitehorn from comment #35)
The latest overview I have been able to find (thanks to bapt) is:
http://beefy18.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=main-amd64-default&build=p569609_s4084b1ab04

The libreoffice-7.1.1.2_4 package has this build log:
http://beefy18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/main-amd64-default/p569609_s4084b1ab04/logs/libreoffice-7.1.1.2_4.log

with:
Host OSVERSION: 1400003
Jail OSVERSION: 1400006

and the jail is apparently at: https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=4084b1ab04
(as of 2021-03-31 20:59:10 +0000).

So that would certainly have the commit from comment #31 in it?
